nasb.text: When Esau was forty years old he married Judith the daughter of Beeri the Hittite, and Basemath the daughter of Elon the Hittite;

esv.text: When Esau was forty years old, he took Judith the daughter of Beeri the Hittite to be his wife, and Basemath the daughter of Elon the Hittite,

cnv.text: 以掃四十歲的時候，娶了赫人比利的女兒猶滴，和赫人以倫的女兒巴實抹為妻。

ccb.text: 以扫四十岁时，娶了赫人比利的女儿犹蒂与赫人以伦的女儿巴实抹。

csbs.text: 以扫四十岁的时候，娶了赫提人比利的女儿犹滴与赫提人以伦的女儿巴实抹为妻。
